data.name: MyFlot Personal Loan
data.overviewText: Flot (MyFlot) offers quick digital personal loans up to ₹1 Lakh with app-based process and fast disbursal. Loans facilitated by RBI-licensed NBFC DSG Investments. APR ranges from 28.8% to 55%.
data.zomintVerdict: Fast digital loan for salaried with good CIBIL.

interestRate.note: From 24%, APR 28.8%-55%, varies by profile (e.g., 2.4% per month)

benefits.benefitText: Quick approval and disbursal in 2-24 hours.
No need for bank statements or payslips.

eligibilityRules.detailedRuleText: Employment: Salaried individuals only; Age criteria: 21 to 59 years.
Minimum monthly income requirement of ₹35,000.
Minimum CIBIL score of 700 required.

cons.text: High interest rates up to 55% APR.

documentSummaries.summaryText: Minimal KYC: PAN, Aadhaar (masked), face match.

processFeatures.description: PAN, Aadhaar, face KYC only.
